reelImport.title: Import Reels
reelImport.uploadDescription: Upload once — Reels are stored locally on your device, ready for any future game.
reelImport.uploadDescriptionHtml: Upload once — locally on your device, ready for any future game.

steps.step2: Choose "Some of your information" → check only Likes → Next
steps.step4: Date range: Last year · Format: JSON → Create files

reelImport.unavailableDesc: Instagram blocked the embed. The game continues — you can still vote based on the context clues!

errors.notJson: Please upload a .json file from your Instagram data export.
errors.wrongFile: Wrong file. Please upload liked_posts.json — not liked_comments.json.
errors.noReels: No liked Reels found in this file.
errors.invalidJson: Could not read the file. Is it valid JSON?
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.

errors.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.lobbyNotFound: Lobby not found. Check your code.
errors.alreadyInLobby: You are already in this lobby.
errors.notHost: Only the host can do this.
errors.reelImportFailed: Could not import this Reel. Make sure the URL is correct.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please slow down.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please rejoin.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.codeInvalid: Code must be letters and numbers only.

home.title: ReelGuess — Guess Who Liked the Reel! 🎬
home.description: The viral party game where you guess which friend liked an Instagram Reel. Play with up to 8 friends, earn points, and crown the ultimate Reel reader!

lobby.description: Join the ReelGuess lobby and start guessing who liked which Instagram Reel.
